ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risk_types" (
  "risk_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk type */,
  "risk_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk type (e.g., transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk type */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of the risk (e.g., operational, financial) */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the risk type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk event */,
  "risk_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of risk */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk event */,
  "risk_probability" REAL /* Probability of the risk event occurring */,
  "impact_coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient indicating the impact severity */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk event */,
  "risk_source" TEXT /* Source of the risk (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the risk event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the risk event (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_events_risk_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_type_id") REFERENCES risk_types ("risk_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision option */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk event */,
  "decision_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the decision (weak, medium, strong) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with implementing this decision */,
  "decision_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the decision */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision implementation (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES risk_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk event being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor who conducted the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., draft, reviewed, finalized) */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Score to quantify the overall assessment */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the assessment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES risk_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the assessor belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the assessor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the assessor within the department */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in risk management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_mitigation_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation plan */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk event */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Description of the mitigation strategy */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the mitigation plan */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the implementation of the strategy */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mitigation plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mitigation plan (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the plan */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the plan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_mitigation_plans_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES risk_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_mitigation_plans_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Manager of the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk event */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the risk assessment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations provided based on the assessment */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "published_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who published the report */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES risk_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_published_by FOREIGN KEY ("published_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system (e.g., office, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
